summary:
The mylohyoid muscle serves as the definitive anatomical divider between the sublingual and submandibular spaces, forming the deep border of the submandibular triangle and physically separating the sublingual glands superiorly from those within the submandibular region inferiorly. This separation is consistently supported across multiple reliable anatomy sources.  

\boxed{\text{mylohyoid muscle}}

\boxed{\text{mylohyoid muscle}}. Answer choice: A
